body.title: Remove sessions — move in-flight/theme/notes to slate, drop session_manager from all skills
body.result: Shipped in a227e6d0. Removed session_manager.py calls from 9 skill files: savestateauto, context-load, decided, sprint, sprint-batch, day-close, deep-audit, design, note. /savestateauto now writes '## In-flight: ...' to slate. /context-load drops show/start session steps and reads In-flight from slate. /decided scope-boundary now greps slate ## Notes for DESIGN_START markers. infra.sessions table left orphaned. session_manager.py left as dead code. 2-day-stale session_id bug class eliminated.
body.description:
Sessions are redundant with the slate (Akien 2026-04-23). The only unique fields — in_flight hypothesis, theme, and key_changes discussion notes — move to new sections on the slate. All session_manager.py calls removed from skill files. Preserves everything useful, eliminates the 2-day-stale session_id class of bugs.

New slate template sections: ## Theme (title line), ## In-flight (default NONE), ## Notes (after ## Done today). Compact preserve string becomes: read YYYYMMDD.slate.txt — no session_manager show.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_skills/{context-load,day-close,decided,deep-audit,design,note,savestateauto,sprint-batch,sprint}/SKILL.md — remove session_manager calls, wire slate reads/writes instead. Sync to ~/.claude/skills/ after edits.

**Design rules:** docs-in-code (skill procedure text IS the docs), test-plan-or-why-not.

**Scope boundary:** IN — 9 skill file rewrites, slate template update, ~/.claude/skills/ rsync. OUT — dropping infra.sessions table (leave orphaned for now), modifying session_manager.py itself (leave file as dead code), cc_queue.py, Igor-internal changes.

**Test plan:** manual: run /context-load → verify ## In-flight section visible in briefing, no session_manager calls fire. Run /savestateauto → verify hypothesis written to slate ## In-flight. Run /sprint done step → verify entry in slate ## Done today, not session DB.
